subcodes.title: Words to a group of friends, spoken on 1913-04-26
subcodes.first_line: Although I could not walk one step last night and it was quite dangerous to go out, I said, I will go. The utmost is that I will become a sacrifice to the friends of God.
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیشب با آنکه حالت قدم برداشتن نبود با وجود این بمجلس رفتیم گفتیم میرویم ولو خطر باشد
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
